    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.AccountingEntry

      class AccountingEntry extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      5837792781542533633L

      • Serialized Fields

        • accountName
          String accountName
          Optional display name for the account. This mirrors the account's name field at the time the entry was created. It is stored on the entry rather than the transaction so that each entry can reference its own account directly.
        • accountNumber
          String accountNumber
          The account number.
        • accountSide
          AccountSide accountSide
          The account side.
        • amount
          BigDecimal amount
          The amount.
        • freeze
          boolean freeze
          The freeze.
        • fundNumber
          String fundNumber
          The fund number.
        • transaction
          AccountingTransaction transaction
          The transaction.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.AccountingTransaction

      class AccountingTransaction extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -8821254116304310L

      • Serialized Fields

        • associatedFundName
          String associatedFundName
          The associated fund name.
        • bookingDateTimestamp
          long bookingDateTimestamp
          The timestamp when the transaction was booked/recorded, in milliseconds since epoch.
        • budgetTracking
          String budgetTracking
          The budget tracking.
        • checkNumber
          String checkNumber
          The check number.
        • clearBank
          String clearBank
          The clear bank.
        • date
          String date
          The date of the transaction, typically in a string format like "YYYY-MM-DD".
        • entries
          Set<AccountingEntry> entries
          The set of accounting entries that make up this transaction. Must not be null or empty.
        • id
          int id
          Unique identifier for the transaction.
        • info
          Map<String,String> info
          Additional information or metadata about the transaction, stored as key-value pairs.
        • memo
          String memo
          A descriptive memo or note for the transaction.
        • supplementalLines
          List<TxnSupplementalLineBase> supplementalLines
          The supplemental lines.
        • toFrom
          String toFrom
          The to from.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ChartOfAccounts

      class ChartOfAccounts extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      6545569795380871696L

      • Serialized Fields

        • chartOfAccounts
          List<Account> chartOfAccounts
          Flat list of all accounts, root and child alike. This list is managed internally and holds all accounts in the chart.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Company

      class Company extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      6728014646115467637L

      • Serialized Fields

        • chartOfAccounts
          ChartOfAccounts chartOfAccounts
          The chart of accounts defining the structure of accounts for the company. Initialized by default.
        • companyFile
          File companyFile
          The file system path to the company's data file. This may be null if the company data is not associated with a file (e.g., new company not yet saved, or data loaded from a different source).
        • companyProfileModel
          CompanyProfileModel companyProfileModel
          The profile information for the company (e.g., name, address). Initialized by default.
        • ledger
          Ledger ledger
          The ledger containing all financial transactions for the company. Initialized by default.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.CompanyProfileModel

      class CompanyProfileModel extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      2138956211273265518L

      • Serialized Fields

        • address
          String address
          The physical address of the company.
        • adminPassword
          String adminPassword
          The password for the administrator account. Note: Storing passwords in plain text is insecure.
        • adminUsername
          String adminUsername
          The username for the administrator account.
        • baseCurrency
          String baseCurrency
          The base currency used for accounting (e.g., "USD", "EUR").
        • chartOfAccountsType
          String chartOfAccountsType
          The type or template of the chart of accounts used (e.g., "Standard Non-Profit").
        • companyFileDir
          String companyFileDir
          Directory where the company file is stored.
        • companyFileName
          String companyFileName
          Name of the company file including extension.
        • companyName
          String companyName
          The official name of the company.
        • defaultBankAccount
          String defaultBankAccount
          The default bank account number used for various operations.
        • email
          String email
          The primary email address for the company.
        • enableFundAccounting
          boolean enableFundAccounting
          Flag to indicate if fund accounting features are enabled.
        • enableInventory
          boolean enableInventory
          Flag to indicate if inventory management features are enabled.
        • enableMultiCurrency
          boolean enableMultiCurrency
          Flag to indicate if multi-currency support is enabled.
        • fiscalYearStart
          String fiscalYearStart
          The start date of the company's fiscal year (e.g., "MM-DD").
        • legalStructure
          String legalStructure
          The legal structure of the company (e.g., LLC, Corporation, Non-Profit).
        • phone
          String phone
          The primary phone number for the company.
        • startingBalanceDate
          String startingBalanceDate
          The date from which starting balances are recorded.
        • taxId
          String taxId
          The company's tax identification number.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Donor

      class Donor extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      4930419801310521918L

      • Serialized Fields

        • donationAmount
          BigDecimal donationAmount
          The amount of a specific donation. This might represent the most recent donation or a donation being processed.
        • donationDate
          Date donationDate
          The date of a specific donation, corresponding to the donationAmount.
        • donationType
          String donationType
          The type or category of the donation (e.g., "Monetary", "In-Kind").
        • donorId
          String donorId
          The unique identifier for the donor.
        • lastDonationDate
          Date lastDonationDate
          The date of the last donation made by this donor.
        • name
          String name
          The name of the donor.
        • totalDonations
          BigDecimal totalDonations
          The total cumulative amount donated by this donor.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.DonorContact

      class DonorContact extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • email
          String email
          The email.
        • id
          String id
          The id.
        • name
          String name
          The name.
        • phone
          String phone
          The phone.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Journal

      class Journal extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -8125095337696271045L

      • Serialized Fields

        • journalTransactions
          List<AccountingTransaction> journalTransactions
          The list of accounting transactions recorded in this journal. This field is final and initialized to an empty ArrayList. It is marked with @JsonProperty for serialization/deserialization purposes. Direct modification of this list from outside the class is discouraged; use Journal.addTransaction(AccountingTransaction), Journal.updateTransaction(AccountingTransaction), and Journal.deleteTransaction(long).

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Ledger

      class Ledger extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      8752049840895321935L

      • Serialized Fields

        • journal
          Journal journal
          The journal containing all accounting transactions for this ledger. This field is final and initialized to a new Journal instance. It is marked with @JsonProperty for serialization/deserialization.

      class Person extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • email
          String email
          The email.
        • id
          long id
          The id.
        • name
          String name
          The name.
        • phone
          String phone
          The phone.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Summary

      class Summary extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      2708260956061642813L

      • Serialized Fields

        • accounts
          List<SummaryAccount> accounts
          A list of account summaries. Initialized to an empty ArrayList.
        • funds
          List<SummaryFund> funds
          A list of fund summaries. Initialized to an empty ArrayList.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.SummaryAccount

      class SummaryAccount extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -7092733266234310917L

      • Serialized Fields

        • accountName
          String accountName
          The name of the account being summarized. Initialized to an empty string.
        • startValue
          double startValue
          The starting value or balance of the account for the summary period. Initialized to 0.0.

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.SummaryFund

      class SummaryFund extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      5590898658697260597L

      • Serialized Fields

        • fundName
          String fundName
          The name of the fund being summarized. Initialized to an empty string.
        • startValue
          double startValue
          The starting value or balance of the fund for the summary period. Initialized to 0.0.

  • Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels

    • Class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.ReportConfigurationTableModel

      class ReportConfigurationTableModel extends AbstractTableModel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      689752243083174861L

      • Serialized Fields

        • columnNames
          String[] columnNames
          The names of the columns to be displayed in the table header.
        • configurations
          List<ReportConfiguration> configurations
          The list of ReportConfiguration objects this table model represents.
        • dateFormatter
          DateTimeFormatter dateFormatter
          Formatter for displaying dates in "MM/dd/yyyy" format.
